title: Hanoi Jeep Tour: Food, Culture and Fun by Vietnam Army Jeep
description: Experience the sights, sounds, and smells of Hanoi in a unique way as you explore the city in a Soviet-era GAZ-69 jeep. See a mix of city highlights and hidden gems in the capital of Vietnam and learn about the country’s history from your guide. Choose from morning, afternoon, or evening tours and enjoy a delicious street food meal.

title: Hanoi Free Tour Guides
description: Hanoi Free Tour Guides is a social non-profit organization founded and run by a group of students and ex-students.Hanoi Free Tour Guides is aimed at promoting and publicly introducing the images of Vietnam, its country and people to foreigners, improving cross-cultural communication and building up a bridge for the enhancement of international relations for the betterment of the society. HFTGs' services are now available in English, Chinese, French, Russian, Korean Japanese, German, Spanish and Italian. Whether you're interested in historical landmarks, local cuisine, or hidden gems off the beaten path, your tour with us shall be an unforgettable memory. Thanks to its great contributions to the public, HFTGs is now well-known as Hanoi Little Ambassadors.

title: Hanoi City Tour Highlight, Train Street Combine visit Countryside
description: Instead of spending ages trapped in the Hanoi traffic in a crowded tour bus or minivan, see a number of attractions from the back of a nimble Vespa scooter on this brisk half-day tour. Explore the remnants of French colonialism in the French Quarter, drive around natural landmarks like the West Lake and Red River Island, see remarkable historical highlights like the Long Bien Bridge, Phu Tay Ho Temple and the Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum.

title: Small Group Hanoi Jeep Tour All Inclusive
description: This tour combines sightseeing, cultural immersion, and food exploration, making it an unforgettable experience!

title: Full-Day Ninh Binh Highlights Tour from Hanoi
description: Skip the hassle of piecing together boats and bike rentals and savor Ninh Binh’s highlights on this guided small-group tour. Visit Hoa Lu, once Vietnam's capital, explore Mua Cave and mountain views, ride a boat through Tam Coc caves, and cycle to Bich Dong Pagoda. Enjoy an authentic Vietnamese lunch and hotel pickup and drop-off by limousine minivan.

title: West Lake
description: The largest lake n Hanoi is a popular spot for gathering, surrounded by many shops, restaurants, gardens, and hotels. It features the Trấn Quốc Pagoda, Vietnamese for "Stabilizing the Nation."

title: Incense Village, Conical Hat, Lacquer Art, SMALL GROUP From Hanoi
description: Explore the rich traditions of Vietnamese handicrafts on this immersive half-day tour from Hanoi. Begin with a pickup in the Old Quarter and visit the renowned Chuong village, famous for its conical hat-making, where you’ll meet local artisans and observe the intricate craft. Next, head to Quang Phu Cau village, known for its century-long incense production, where you can see the colorful incense-making process firsthand. This tour encompasses cultural insights and artisan techniques, offering a unique glimpse into Vietnamese life.  - Duration: Approximately 6 hours with morning and afternoon options - Visit two traditional villages: Conical Hat and Incense Craft - Engage with local artisans and learn about their crafts - Optional drop-off at Hanoi Train Street after the tour

title: Vietnam Museum of Ethnology
description: Vietnam Museum of Ethnology is a unit under Vietnam Academy of Scocial Sciences. Vietnam Museum of Ethnology is both a research centre and a public museum exhibiting the ethnic groups of Vietnam. The mission of the Museum is scientific research, collection, documentation, conservation, exhibition and preserving the cultural and historic patrimony of the nation's different ethnic groups. The museum also serves to guide research, conservation, and technology that are specific to the work of an ethnographic museum.

title: Ninh Binh Full-Day Small Group of 9 Guided Tour from Hanoi
description: Combine three scenic attractions in one tour with this full-day small-group tour ( 9 travellers per group) to Ninh Binh: Mua Cave, Tam Coc, and Hoa Lu - ancient capital: - Go up to the top of mountain at Mua Cave to have overview of Ninh Binh and limestone moutain system. - Easy and fun cycling on flat ground, around rice fields next to limestone mountain (relax at restaurant if you can not bike)  - See local life in countryside of Vietnam. - Boating at Tam Coc, known as the Halong on land. - Visit Hoa Lu - the ancient capital - Includes all entrance fees, lunch, bottled water (3 bottles/per) - Gain more from your visit with a local guide to provide commentary

title: Hanoi Heritage Premium Daily Tour
description: Hanoi Capital is always of the top destinations in Vietnam for many foreign travelers. As one of the leading trend operators, Ha Noi Heritage Premium Daily Tours has organized the widest choice of luxury tours including must-see attractions such as Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum; Tran Quoc Pagoda; Vietnam Museum of Ethnology; Temple of Literature... We use luxury limousines transfer service, and own our private Luxury restaurant call "Mesdames Linh Cuisine" serving the best local specialties. Moreover, we establish and maintain strong rapport with our customers, prospects, and bussiness partners, providing the top-quality tour at value-for-money prices. Ha Noi Heritage Premium consistently emphasizes satisfying our guests and meeting our customers’expectations.

title: Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum
description: **This place is temporarily closed** Every year many thousands of respectful citizens and tourists visit the final resting place of the country’s most notable historic figure.

title: Hanoi Opera House
description: Resembling the Opéra Palais Garnier, Hanoi Opera House, built in 10 years since 1911 by two French architects. The magnificent building became one of the top landmarks in Hanoi. The Opera House hosts cultural entertaining performances, bamboo cirque, contemporary dance, orchestra concerts and government events. Come to the front gate to check availability and ticket to a performance in this iconic building.

title: Hanoi City Tour: Private Half-Day Customized with Train Street
description: This private half-day tour of Hanoi is unique for its blend of iconic landmarks, cultural immersion, and local experiences. You'll visit the serene Tran Quoc Pagoda, the historic Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, and the thrilling Train Street, where a train passes inches from homes. Explore traditional craft streets in the Old Quarter, where artisans continue age-old trades, and end at the vibrant Dong Xuan Market, offering a taste of local life. The tour’s personalized nature allows for a deeper, more intimate connection with Hanoi’s rich heritage in a short amount of time.

title: Hanoi Car
description: Today Hanoi Car Tours and Transportation are one of the leading tour operators and providing great services for Transfer, the cruise ships passengers in Ha Long Bay, Sapa, Eco-Trang An grottoes and all the other tours in Vietnam.

title: Private Guided Tour of Hanoi
description: Explore Hanoi’s Old Quarter on a private guided walking tour with a local student guide. Choose from a half-day or full-day tour. Get picked up at your hotel in the Old Quarter and head to the Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, Temple of Literature, Hoa Lo Prison, Ancient House, and Hoan Kiem Lake.

title: Hanoi Highlights: Half-day City Tour
description: Explore Hanoi’s rich architecture and culture on a tour that fits all of the highlights into a half-day excursion perfect for busy travelers who have limited time in the city. While the bustling city can be overwhelming on your own, with a small-group tour you don’t have to worry about navigating the busy streets and can learn about the sites along the way from your guide.

title: Asiatica Travel
description: Asiatica Travel is a tour operator based in Vietnam, offering not just private day trips in Hanoi but also customized private journeys to Vietnam, Laos and Cambodia. Founded in 2001 by four local guides, Asiatica is now one of the biggest and most trustworthy local tour operators in Indochina, includes also Myanmar and Thailand. International tourism license No. 0513/LHQT

title: Long Bien Bridge
description: The Long Bien bridge across the Red River connects Hanoi with the main port of Haiphong. Designed by Gustave Eiffel, the bridge sustained significant damage during the Vietnam War. Only half of the bridge retains its original shape, but a rebuilding project supported by the French government is currently in progress to restore the bridge to its original appearance.

title: Local Market Tour and Private Cooking Class
description: Explore Hanoi’s food and culture scene with this private market tour followed by a hands-on cooking class. You’ll learn all about the fresh produce in the market, and travel around in a cyclo- the way the locals get around. You’ll then get back to your guide’s kitchen, where you’ll prepare a traditional three course meal before you get to eat it with your private group.

title: Hanoi City Half Day Private Tour: Hidden Corners & Train Street
description: With thousands of years of history and entrenched in a clash of cultures, this private half-day tour lets you explore Hanoi with a local guide. Travel from traditional pagodas to bustling markets and serene lakes, going beyond guidebooks into hidden corners. See Hanoi Old Quarter's 2,000-year history, snap photos of French colonial architecture, and experience the thrill of Train Street—a must-do when visiting Hanoi.

title: Hanoi City Tour : Hanoi Highlights and Hidden Gems
description: Experience the Best of Hanoi with the Half Day Hanoi City Tour to discover Hanoi Highlights & Hidden Gems. This exceptional Hanoi city tour provides an opportunity to delve into the historical city, immerse in its captivating culture, and uncover its hidden treasures.  By choosing our small group tour in a comfortable and luxurious minivan, you can enhance your experience by avoiding wasted time waiting for others and dealing with crowds. It’s also a great opportunity to meet new people and embark on a delightful journey together.  Discover the must-see sights in Hanoi, including the Ho Chi Minh Complex, Temple of Literature, French Quarter, Old Quarter, Long Bien Bridge, Westlake, and the famous Hanoi Train Street.  Uncover the lesser-known treasures of Hanoi by venturing through its labyrinth of narrow alleyways and immersing yourself in the daily lives of locals.  Embark on an authentic Hanoi experience that showcases the city’s unique blend of the good & the bad.

title: Private Crowd Free Hanoi: Morning Highlights of the City Experience
description: Follow in the footsteps of one of Vietnam’s most famous historic men, Ho Chi Minh ( first president of the Democratic Republic of Vietnam), as you explore the streets of Hanoi on this private tour. Pay a visit to the Temple of Literature and the notorious "Hanoi Hilton" (Hoa Loa Prison). Then, follow your guide on a walking tour of the Old-Quarter and enjoy the inside knowledge that comes from being led by a local.

title: Small Group Half-day Hanoi City Tour with Train Street Visit (4h)
description: Discover the best of Vietnam's capital as you embark on a half-day sightseeing tour of Hanoi in an air-conditioned van. Join a small group and get acquainted with the city's daily life, scenery, and culture. Visit several highlights including the Ancient House, Art Center, Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, Tran Quoc Pagoda, Hoa Lo Prison, and the famous train street.

title: Hanoi Happy Tours
description: Hanoi Happy Tours offers tours to every single corner of the historic and beautiful Hanoi with informative guides. We are proud of having a highly professional team with deep understanding of the area to bring out the best of the city. We are also eager to show you the very different spirit of Hanoi and its beauty as well as giving you the chance to truly immerse yourselves into local life.

title: Halong Tours Booking
description: Halong Tours Booking is the fastest growing online booking website focusing on SIC Tours . Halong Tours Booking positions itself to be a smart way to book SouthEast Asia Tours. With the best price & guarantee the best value to customers. We are a licensed International inbound tour operator and our connections are national and global. Founded by Mrs Anna Nguyen Huong in 2013, We aims to be the most trusted destination management company in South Asia. From the Founder – "Smart way to book SouthEast Asia Tours?" “Thank you for visiting Halong Tours Booking today! Our mission is provide the best classic packages for SouthEast Asia region with amazing personal services because in Halong Tours Booking, Customer is always in a top priority”.

title: Halong Bay Day Tour By Diamond Era Cruise,Titop,Sung Sot & kayak
description: You will admire the beauty of Halong Heritages with Diamond Era luxury 5-star cruise which has a luxurious and elegant design. Diamond Era Cruise will make your trip to Ha Long Bay more complete.  The tour could last about 6 hours for route 2. The Diamond Era 5-Star cruise has a capacity for 130 passengers, with 2 big restaurants, on the 1st upper deck. This product has a "Sunset party", Sunsetbathing, and a Jacuzzi pool. Upon pickup, you will be transported by a Limousine bus 2 ways by expressway. The delicious & variety of buffet lunch with vegetarian options, seafood, and Vietnamese cuisine, and all entrance fees included on the package: Caves, Titop island, Kayaking, Activities, and our enthusiastic tour guide during your trip.

title: Hanoi Old Quarter Street Food Tours
description: Any visitor to Hanoi is faced with a multitude of choices when it comes to Vietnamese cuisine. This walking tour with a foodie as your guide takes away the guesswork. Let an insider lead the way to some of the best food stands and eateries in Hanoi’s Old Quarter. You’ll observe local life while filling up on flavors that make Hanoi a culinary destination.

title: Imperial Citadel of Thang Long
description: Welcome to the Imperial Citadel of Thang Long – Hanoi! Situated at the heart of Hanoi, the Central Sector of the Imperial Citadel of Thang Long is an outstanding place of interest not only for the capital city but also for the country as a whole. The site is one of the ten special national heritage sites proclaimed by the Prime Minister in 2009 and was inscribed on the World Heritage List by UNESCO’s World Heritage Committee in 2010. Its Outstanding Universal Values are reflected in its historical longevity, its continuous role as a seat of power, and its multiple cultural layers. The World Heritage Site comprises two sections: the archaeological site at 18 Hoang Dieu Street and the central axis of the Nguyen Dynasty’s Citadel of Hanoi, which together create an integrated heritage complex. This was the most important sector of Thang Long Citadel, the capital of Dai Viet under the Ly, Tran, and Le dynasties from the 11th to the 18th centuries. It was also the core of the earlier Dai

title: Thanh Chuong's Viet Palace
description: Vietnamese heritage preservation. Top Vietnamese cultural identical tour to the past within a few hours.

title: Ninh Binh Full-Day Tour from Hanoi to Hoa Lu, Tam Coc & Mua Cave Via Boat & Bike
description: Escape the bustling confines of Hanoi city, and breath the fresh air on this full-day rural Vietnam tour. With a local lunch of goat meat, fried rice and local fruits onboard, you’ll be fueled for an afternoon of action, taking in the scenery by both bamboo boat and mountain bike. See local villagers going about their daily lives as you come to appreciate a quieter slice of Vietnamese culture.

title: Hanoi Jeep Tour: Food, Culture and Fun by Vietnam Army Jeep
description: Experience the sights, sounds, and smells of Hanoi in a unique way as you explore the city in a Soviet-era GAZ-69 jeep. See a mix of city highlights and hidden gems in the capital of Vietnam and learn about the country’s history from your guide. Choose from morning, afternoon, or evening tours and enjoy a delicious street food meal.

title: Hanoi Motorbike Tour: Food, Culture and Fun by Vintage Motorbike
description: Discover the cuisine of northern Vietnam on a food tour of Hanoi. Hop on the back of a vintage motorbike and zoom through the streets of the city in search of delicious dishes. Choose from a morning, afternoon, or evening departure and enjoy tastings of delectable street foods as well as a complimentary drink over the course of a few hours.

title: Small Group Hanoi Street Food Tour with a Real Foodie
description: Navigating Hanoi’s busy streets on your own can be challenging, but on this food walking tour, you just need to follow your guide to tasty spots. Although the itinerary may change, possible tastings on include rice noodle soup with beef, snails, steamed pancakes, Vietnamese sandwiches and various kinds of donuts. You’ll also enjoy lunch or dinner at a restaurant, depending on the departure time you choose.

title: Full-Day Ninh Binh Highlights Tour from Hanoi
description: Skip the hassle of piecing together boats and bike rentals and savor Ninh Binh’s highlights on this guided small-group tour. Visit Hoa Lu, once Vietnam's capital, explore Mua Cave and mountain views, ride a boat through Tam Coc caves, and cycle to Bich Dong Pagoda. Enjoy an authentic Vietnamese lunch and hotel pickup and drop-off by limousine minivan.

title: Hanoi Backstreet Tours
description: Hanoi Backstreet Tours is the ORIGINAL BACKSTREET TOUR company. We organize daily AFFORDABLE & REASONABLE vintage Jeep, Vintage Motorbike, Vespa & Sidecar tours. We offer authentic experiences of Food, Culture, Sightseeing, and Fun in and around Hanoi, Ninh Binh, Hoi An, Ha Giang, Da Nang, and Ho Chi Minh City. We provide unique and impactful food, culture, and fun experiences for those who want to learn about and discover the real Vietnam, live a day in the life of Vietnamese, and enjoy authentic local foods and cultural connections.

title: 5 Traditional Dishes Hanoi Cooking Class with Market Trip
description: Learn to cook like a local during this lesson in Hanoi. After meeting up with an informative instructor in the historic Old Quarter, head to the city’s largest market and learn about the basics of Vietnamese cooking. Pick the best produce and spices, then cook several authentic dishes. Afterward, enjoy your creations while sipping complimentary rice wine.

title: Hanoi Motorbike Tours Led By Women: Hanoi By Night Foodie Motorbike Tours
description: Taste your way through Vietnam’s capital city on this nighttime excursion. After a convenient hotel pickup, hop on a motorbike with a female guide and savor complimentary dishes like *banh cuon* (steamed roll cake), *bun cha* (grilled pork with vermicelli noodles), and *banh ran ngot* (salty and sweet donuts). Get an insider’s view of Hanoi’s food scene while exploring sites such as the Old Quarter, Ngu Xa and village.

title: [HOT] Hanoi Old Quarter Walking Street Food - Small Group Tour
description: Explore Hanoi’s Old Quarter on foot with a foodie guide who introduces you to local cuisine and helps you overcome the language barrier. This street food tour takes you off the beaten path to food stalls and local eateries in Vietnam's capital city. Sample authentic dishes and learn about Vietnamese cuisine as you discover the traditional guilds of ‘36 Old Streets.’ Plus, you can upgrade to add an egg coffee class, visit to the famous Train Street to your itinerary, or make your dishes extra spicy.

title: Hanoi Backstreet Jeep Tour : Hanoi HIGHTLIGHTS and HIDDEN GEMS
description: This half-day Hanoi Jeep tour offers a unique way to see city highlights and hidden gems. Ride in a Vietnam Army Jeep through the city's backstreets and markets, stopping at landmarks and a local café for traditional egg coffee. Hotel pickup and drop-off in Hanoi Old Quarter are included for convenience.

title: Hanoi half-day with Food + Culture + Fun By Minsk Motorcycle
description: Hanoi is known as the “capital of the motorbike kingdom” with over 5 million bikes on the streets every day. The goal of this tour is to immerse you in a true living museum of Hanoi life. Our professional guides will provide you with a WOW experience in just a few hours on our customized USSR VINTAGE MINSK motorbike. Take you off the beaten path through Hanoi’s backstreets and to famous sites, all while sampling special local dishes.

title: Private Hanoi Street Food Walking Tour With Real Foodie
description: Any visitor to Hanoi is faced with a multitude of choices when it comes to Vietnamese cuisine. This half-day private walking tour with a foodie as your guide takes away the guesswork. Let an insider lead the way to some of the best food stands and eateries in Hanoi’s Old Quarter. You’ll observe local life while filling up on flavors that make Hanoi a culinary destination.

title: Hanoi Coffee Workshop: Taste Salt, Coconut and Egg Coffee
description: Delve into Hanoi's vibrant coffee scene with an immersive coffee workshop. Learn about Vietnam's rich coffee history and unique brewing techniques. Discover how to brew authentic Vietnamese coffee from professionals and learn how to discern between a perfectly brewed cup and an ordinary one.

title: Hanoi Half-day with Food + Fun + Culture By Russian Jeep
description: The Soviet Union’s answer to the US military Jeep, the GAZ-69 4WD was a staple of the winning side during the Vietnam War. Experience Hanoi in wartime style on this food tour with a difference. You’ll see famous sights and local life and how the two combine; you’ll sample enough dishes to make an entire breakfast, lunch, or dinner; hotel pickup from the Old Quarter adds convenience.

title: Ha Food Tours
description: Ha Food Tours is a company provides and operated tourism products relate with cuisine and culture in Hanoi Old Quarter such as: walking street food tour, cooking class, market visiting e.g.

title: Hanoi e.Buddies
description: Hanoi e.Buddies (Hebs) is a volunteer student tour guide organization in Hanoi dedicated to spreading the genuine beauty and culture of our 1000-year-old capital city of Vietnam to beloved international friends. “Energetic”, “Enthusiastic” and “Eager to learn” - these are what identify us. Traveling is all about connecting people together and that is exactly the mision we want to completed after every FREE tour of us. Happy moments and memorable journeys are just a click away from now! ➡️➡️➡️ Visit our website https://hanoiebuddies.vn/ to have a look at our city and go around with us in your personal tours! ✨

title: Ha Noi Walking Food Tour, Non Vegetarian,Vegan, vegetarian Option
description: Explore Hanoi’s street food scene with a local guide on this private walking tour. Sample authentic street food dishes and drinks as you learn about Vietnamese cuisine and culture. Visit seven to 10 food locations, enjoy tastings, and learn traditional ways to eat each dish. Hotel pickup is included for added convenience.

title: Vespa Adventures
description: We don’t want to just give you a tour, we want to give you an adventure that you won’t forget. An adventure that shows you the sights tourists don’t usually get to see. So, take the Ride Of Your Life with us to meet the people, see the culture, and taste the authentic flavours of Vietnam.

title: Hanoi street food tour (small group)
description: Book this small group tour for an intimate foodie experience, while keeping costs down by sharing your guide. Try several of Hanoi’s top dishes as you walk the city streets. Your guide will take you to spots you couldn’t find on your own, and explain the intricacies of the dishes you taste along the way. The tour is stroller accessible but does not provide infant seats.

title: Incense Village, Hat Making & Lacquer Artisan Small Group Hanoi
description: Immerse yourself in a relaxing tour from Hanoi through three villages that are famous for their traditional crafts. Discover the arts of lacquerware, incense, and conical hat making as a driver takes you to the Chuong, Ha Thai and Quang Phu Cau villages. Learn about the local culture and craftspeople at each stop, then try your hand at lacquer painting and crafting a hat.

title: Vietnam Group Tour
description: Asia Group Tour is a local based provider offering a wide range of tourist services in Vietnam. Our market is from budget travelers who have a chance to join daily typical tour with others, to travelers who want a customized tour, personalized service and a high quality product, to those who want to get something special and have the travel experience they desire. We care about every customer's demand and do our best on every tour to offer customers from all walk of life enjoyable trips with us.

title: Hanoi Street Food Tour
description: Hanoi street food tour is a leading local street food travel company located inside old quarter . Our company is not only organizing for street food walking tours ,but also organizing Hanoi city sightseeing, train street & food eating by motorbike, Cyclo tours,biking tours and organizing City sightseeing street food tours on the back of a scooters Located at 78a Đ. Tran Nhat Duat Street, Dong Xuan, Hoan Kiem, Hanoi

title: Hanoi Heritage Premium Daily Tour
description: Hanoi Capital is always of the top destinations in Vietnam for many foreign travelers. As one of the leading trend operators, Ha Noi Heritage Premium Daily Tours has organized the widest choice of luxury tours including must-see attractions such as Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum; Tran Quoc Pagoda; Vietnam Museum of Ethnology; Temple of Literature... We use luxury limousines transfer service, and own our private Luxury restaurant call "Mesdames Linh Cuisine" serving the best local specialties. Moreover, we establish and maintain strong rapport with our customers, prospects, and bussiness partners, providing the top-quality tour at value-for-money prices. Ha Noi Heritage Premium consistently emphasizes satisfying our guests and meeting our customers’expectations.

title: MF Spa Hanoi
description: In the heart of Hanoi’s Old Quarter, surrounded by history and charm, lies MF Spa Hanoi, a sanctuary of renewal and rejuvenation. Here, the East harmonizes with the West, and ancient philosophies meet contemporary techniques to create an unparalleled healing experience. This haven of tranquility blends advanced global therapies with regional holistic traditions, drawing on nature's local treasures to restore balance and provide an extraordinary opportunity for deep relaxation and recovery. For an unforgettable romantic experience, MF Spa Hanoi boasts a luxurious treatment room designed for couples, where lovebirds can cherish each other's company amidst serenity and peace. MF Spa Hanoi—truly relax.

title: Ninh Binh Day Tour To Visit Hoa Lu - Trang An/Tam Coc - Mua Cave
description: Ninh Binh is at least a 2-hour drive from Hanoi. Enjoy plenty of personal space on this small-group guided tour by limousine bus, with hotel pickup. Start at Hoa Lu with its ancient royal temples, ride a bike around local villages, and enjoy a buffet lunch featuring Vietnamese specialties. Choose between Trang An or Tam Coc for a scenic boat ride. Finally, climb nearly 500 steps above Mua Cave for breathtaking views of Ngo Dong River.

title: Guided Hanoi Food Tour With Train Street 8 Different Food Tasting
description: The 3-hour Hanoi Old Quarter Foods & Train Tour offers a blend of delicious street foods, cultural insights, and the unforgettable experience of Train Street, making it a must-do for food enthusiasts and travelers looking to explore the heart of Hanoi’s culinary scene. The Hanoi Street Foods & Train Street tour offers a rich tapestry of culinary delights, cultural immersion, thrilling experiences, and local insights, making it an essential and unforgettable part of any visit to Hanoi.

title: Vietnamese Food Cooking Class in Hanoi with Market Experience
description: Immerse yourself in Vietnamese cuisine in this small-group cooking class in Hanoi. Start with a visit to the largest market in the city, where you will get to sample local dishes, purchase fresh ingredients and see a glimpse of the daily life of locals. Learn how to make three authentic Vietnamese dishes, which can you savor afterwards with tea and coffee.

title: Hanoi Food Tours
description: Explore Hanoi’s Old Quarter like a local on this walking street food tasting tour with a local guide. Go off the beaten path to food stalls, small restaurants, and markets to sample authentic dishes and learn about Vietnamese cuisine, as you discover the traditional guilds of 36 Streets of the Old Quarter.

title: Hanoi Jeep Adventures
description: Hanoi jeep Adventures Tour gives you a unique way to see Hanoi. Perfect for those who want to get off the beaten path, go to non-tourist areas and see the real Hanoi. We design an itinerary that provides a unique, cultural, fun and once in a life-time adventure. For you to see the real Vietnam and backstreets. see the GOOD, Bad, Fancy, Busy, Noisy, farm countryside,.. The best way for you to learn the peak of the history and culture. At Hanoi Jeep Adventures we offer Hanoi City tour 4m5 hours, night street food tour 4 hours, and red river countryside tour

title: Ninh Binh Day Trip: Hoa Lu-Trang An/Tam Coc-Mua Cave-Cycling-Boat
description: Visit the Dinh King temple in the Hoa Lu ancient capital by bicycle - Visit Mua Cave by hiking 500 steps to Lying Dragon Mountain to enjoy stunning view - Have the Vietnamese buffet lunch at the local restaurant - The most satisfying boat tour in Ninh Binh with a combination of visiting picturesque Trang An Grottoes.  >>  >> Comfortable Shuttle bus transfer >> Enthusiastic and experienced English speaking guide .

title: Hanoi Jeep Tour: Food, Culture and Fun by Vietnam Army Jeep
description: Experience the sights, sounds, and smells of Hanoi in a unique way as you explore the city in a Soviet-era GAZ-69 jeep. See a mix of city highlights and hidden gems in the capital of Vietnam and learn about the country’s history from your guide. Choose from morning, afternoon, or evening tours and enjoy a delicious street food meal.

title: Hanoi Motorbike Tour: Food, Culture and Fun by Vintage Motorbike
description: Discover the cuisine of northern Vietnam on a food tour of Hanoi. Hop on the back of a vintage motorbike and zoom through the streets of the city in search of delicious dishes. Choose from a morning, afternoon, or evening departure and enjoy tastings of delectable street foods as well as a complimentary drink over the course of a few hours.

title: Small Group Hanoi Jeep Tour All Inclusive
description: This tour combines sightseeing, cultural immersion, and food exploration, making it an unforgettable experience!

title: Full-Day Ninh Binh Highlights Tour from Hanoi
description: Skip the hassle of piecing together boats and bike rentals and savor Ninh Binh’s highlights on this guided small-group tour. Visit Hoa Lu, once Vietnam's capital, explore Mua Cave and mountain views, ride a boat through Tam Coc caves, and cycle to Bich Dong Pagoda. Enjoy an authentic Vietnamese lunch and hotel pickup and drop-off by limousine minivan.

title: Hanoi Opera House
description: Resembling the Opéra Palais Garnier, Hanoi Opera House, built in 10 years since 1911 by two French architects. The magnificent building became one of the top landmarks in Hanoi. The Opera House hosts cultural entertaining performances, bamboo cirque, contemporary dance, orchestra concerts and government events. Come to the front gate to check availability and ticket to a performance in this iconic building.

title: Hanoi City Highlights Walking Tour – Landmarks & History
description: Uncover Hanoi's Untold Stories and the Vietnam War! Discover History & Culture, having FUN fun in the heart of Hanoi. Delve deeply into about Vietnamese's lifestyle. You Will Love it ❤ ❤   Highlight : • Why early ? -> Beat the crowd + the heat. • Small Group of Up to 6️⃣ people • Focus on History & Culture & Fun • Gain deep insight into Vietnamese lifestyle

title: Hanoi City Tour: Private Half-Day Customized with Train Street
description: This private half-day tour of Hanoi is unique for its blend of iconic landmarks, cultural immersion, and local experiences. You'll visit the serene Tran Quoc Pagoda, the historic Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, and the thrilling Train Street, where a train passes inches from homes. Explore traditional craft streets in the Old Quarter, where artisans continue age-old trades, and end at the vibrant Dong Xuan Market, offering a taste of local life. The tour’s personalized nature allows for a deeper, more intimate connection with Hanoi’s rich heritage in a short amount of time.

title: Chua Tran Quoc
description: Chùa Trấn Quốc (or Tran Quoc Pagoda) is located beside the dazzling West Lake, on Thanh Nien Road, Hanoi. Particularly, it is seated on an island linked by a bridge to the causeway between the two most romantic lakes of Hanoi: West Lake and Truc Bach Lake.

title: Vespa City Tour &Train Street Female With Ao Dai Riders 4,5 Hours
description: Take in some of Hanoi’s historic highlights and spectacular sights from the back of a Vespa scooter on this half-day tour. Instead of watching the sights fly past from the back seat of a crowded tour bus, enjoy the open air and get uninterrupted photos at landmarks like the Long Bien Bridge and the Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum. Experience different ways of living in Hanoi, from farm life on the Red River to the hustle and bustle of the French Quarter.

title: Long Bien Bridge
description: The Long Bien bridge across the Red River connects Hanoi with the main port of Haiphong. Designed by Gustave Eiffel, the bridge sustained significant damage during the Vietnam War. Only half of the bridge retains its original shape, but a rebuilding project supported by the French government is currently in progress to restore the bridge to its original appearance.

title: Hanoi Instagram Tour: The Most Scenic Spots
description: Give your social media a boost while in Hanoi on this half-day small-group tour to capture visually inspiring content for your feed. Travel by motorbike or car, and visit locations such as Hanoi Train Street, Phung Hung Mural Street, Long Bien Bridge, and more, with an English-speaking guide providing deeper insights. Hotel pickup and drop-off in the Old Quarter area are included for convenience.

title: Imperial Citadel of Thang Long
description: Welcome to the Imperial Citadel of Thang Long – Hanoi! Situated at the heart of Hanoi, the Central Sector of the Imperial Citadel of Thang Long is an outstanding place of interest not only for the capital city but also for the country as a whole. The site is one of the ten special national heritage sites proclaimed by the Prime Minister in 2009 and was inscribed on the World Heritage List by UNESCO’s World Heritage Committee in 2010. Its Outstanding Universal Values are reflected in its historical longevity, its continuous role as a seat of power, and its multiple cultural layers. The World Heritage Site comprises two sections: the archaeological site at 18 Hoang Dieu Street and the central axis of the Nguyen Dynasty’s Citadel of Hanoi, which together create an integrated heritage complex. This was the most important sector of Thang Long Citadel, the capital of Dai Viet under the Ly, Tran, and Le dynasties from the 11th to the 18th centuries. It was also the core of the earlier Dai

title: VIVAGO TRAVEL
description: Vivago Travel offers exclusive tours for international visitors to explore the beauty and culture of Vietnam. Guests will visit iconic destinations such as Ha Long Bay, Hoi An, Hanoi, Ho Chi Minh City... With immersive and culinary experiences, Vivago ensures a memorable, enriching, and seamless journey through Vietnam's diverse landscapes.

title: Hanoi Motorbike Street Foods - Day Tours
description: Hanoi Motorbike Street Foods is a local travel company based on old quarter Hanoi that specially on organizing motorbike street foods ,drink,water puppet show ,cyclo and urban homestay tours to discover narrow streets inside old quarter ,taste local food and enjoy urban lifes of Hanoi !

title: Ninh Binh Day Tour from Hanoi: Hoa Lu Trang An and Mua Caves
description: Escape the bustling streets of Hanoi for a scenic day trip to Ninh Binh, often called “Halong Bay on land.” Nestled in the northern region of Vietnam, Ninh Binh is a stunning landscape of limestone mountains, tranquil rivers, and rich historical sites.

title: Hanoi Jeep Tours Led By Women: City & Red River Half Day
description: Explore a different side of Hanoi away from the tourist hotspots on this small-group tour through the city’s neighborhoods and backstreets. But instead of a stuffy tour bus, you'll explore via Jeep. You'll see unique sights like the Huu Tiep Lake and the city’s infamous ‘Train Street’, whizz past landmarks like Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, and more. You'll also stop to taste iconic foods and drinks, adding quintessential flavor to your adventure.

title: Bicycle Tours Hanoi
description: Bicycle tour Hanoi we are proffesional company provide bicycle tour around hanoi city for half day tour explore city of hanoi and half day countryside around hanoi, or we one day trip for city tour and countryside and also arrange long day trip, and especailly we arrange for you cycling to see sunset and sunrise time in hanoi

title: Hanoi Biking Travel
description: Welcome to Hanoi Biking Travel.We organize Group - private daily tours around Vietnam such as: Hanoi city tour; Halong Bay cruise; Sapa trekking; Mai Chau Trekking;Perfume pagoda; Hoalu - Tam Coc ; Hue - Danang - Hoi An; Nha Trang beach tours, Sai Gon - Mekong delta.... and so on. Specially,We arrange some new biking tours on the countryside. It is said that travel by bike ( or Motorcycle ) is the best way to discover Vietnam , either for old or young people recently because of the good condition of all roads, even in the countryside with a reasonable costs and flexible schedule, travelers can enjoy biking trip any time and any where to get unforgettable experience for a peaceful and restful local life in your journey..With our long experience working in tourism, we are sure to server you on the best way.Your satisfaction is our reputation.

title: Private Hanoi City Half-Day Tour with Train Street Visiting
description: The best way to explore Hanoi is on foot, and a private guide helps you navigate the city like a local. Cover Hanoi's major highlights and learn about its culture from your guide. You'll get personalized attention and can ask your guide as many questions as you like. Check off attractions such as the Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum Complex, Tran Quoc Pagoda, and the famous train street.

title: Hanoi Vespa Tours: Hanoi Countryside Vintage Vespa Tours
description: Discover the breathtaking charm of Northern Vietnam's rural landscape as you effortlessly glide past vast rice terraces and lush gardens.  Delve into Vietnam's vibrant history with a trip to the Co Loa Ancient Citadel Temple, where ancient tales and legends animate the ancient ruins.  Immerse yourself in the lively atmosphere of local markets, where the pulse of daily life resonates through the bustling streets.  Connect with countryside dwellers, swapping stories over a comforting cup of tea in their homes, and gaining insights into their distinctive way of life.  Wrap up your journey with a culinary treat, savoring authentic local dishes and indulging in Vietnamese egg coffee or delightful Mango Pudding dessert at a cherished local spot.

title: Private Half-Day Hanoi Food Tour by Motorbike
description: Discover the rich history and charm of Hanoi on a half-day food tour by scooter. Travel around the Old Quarter, Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum and West Lake at a relaxed pace and see the city from a unique perspective. You’ll visit the most popular sights, where you can stop for plenty of photo ops.

title: Ho Chi Minh Museum
description: Wellcome to Ho Chi Minh Museum! President Ho Chi Minh - Vietnamese hero of national liberation and great man of culture. After he passed away on September 2nd 1969, in compliance with the Vietnamese people’s aspiration, the Communist Party of Vietnam’s Politburo decided to build the Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum and the Ho Chi Minh Museum. After 20 years of preparing and building, the Ho Chi Minh Museum was inaugurated on September 2nd 1990, on the occasion of the 100th birthday of the President. Ho Chi Minh Museum has more than 170,000 decuments, objects and films about President Ho Chi Minh’s life and revolutionary work. They are invaluable assets of the Vietnamese people in educating patriotism, studying and following Ho Chi Minh’s thought and moral quallties; and encouraging the Vietnamese generations to succeed failthfully and excellently his great revolutionary work.

title: St. Joseph's Cathedral
description: Entering this majestic church is like walking into 1886, as little has changed since it first opened its doors.

title: Motorbike City Tours
description: Motorbike City Tours – Hanoi Food and Sights Motorbike Tours Led by Women is mainly female drivers Hanoi-based Motorbikes, Vespa and Jeep Tours providing safe and fun adventures for travelers who want to see not only the famous landmarks, but get a glimpse of the hidden gems and authentic lifestyle of Hanoi’s locals. Over the past decade, we’ve been honored to empower thousands of women in Vietnam’s tourism industry, offering exceptional tours in Hanoi. Whether your interests lie in cuisine, culture, or sightseeing, booking one of our celebrated Vietnam tours will demonstrate why over 100,000 guests have trusted us to create their most cherished memories in Vietnam!

title: Unique Tours
description: VietNam Unique Travels Specializes in organizing domestic and international tours. Specializes in organizing meetings, outdoor learning trips. Organizes seminars, conferences, recreational activities, and Teambuilding programs combined with tourism. Airline ticket agency: Agent for foreign airlines: Singapore Airlines, Thai Airways, Qatar Airways, Air France, etc. Other auxiliary services: Car rental for tourism, train tickets, visa services, etc. Hotel bookings both domestically and internationally.

title: Hanoi Street Food Tour By Motorbike + Sightseeing SAFE & FUN
description: Embark on a thrilling half-day private scooter food tour in Hanoi and explore the city’s vibrant flavors and authentic cuisine. Experience the ride of a lifetime as you discover Hanoi’s unique culinary treasures, from the famous Obama bun cha to Aunt Tu’s renowned snail seafood stall. Satisfy your sweet tooth with a refreshing dessert experience, indulging in the delightful Mango Jelly made from luscious ripe mangoes. Conclude your motorbike tour with a visit to the enchanting Train Street Cafe. Book your spot on our “Half Day Private Hanoi Street Food Tour by Scooter” today and experience Hanoi like never before!

title: Friends Travel Vietnam - Day Tours
description: Let us inspire you whilst on holiday in Vietnam...Friends Travel is a well-established licensed tour operator based in Hanoi, runs under the brand name Friends Travel Vietnam and Hanoi Walkie Talkie Tour. Offering the best daily and private guided tours throughout Vietnam, creating an unforgettable experience just for you. Our multi-cultural team ensures a truly unforgettable experience... Travelling with Friends Travel Vietnam is the very best way to get up close and to get the greatest and unique experience about Vietnam in a way you’d never manage on your own. With our expertise over the years, we’ve brought together people from all over the globe to create lifelong connections. Our multi-cultural team ensures the perfect mix between expert local knowledge and Western communication and service skills, so you can rest assured that customer satisfaction is always our first priority.

title: Hanoi Flag Tower
description: This place was built between 1805 and 1812 under King Gia Long and is over 2 centuries old. It resembles an old stone fortress and has steps leading to the top where one can get a good view of the city. There are old cannon sitting at the base of the place at grand level.

title: ViettrendTour
description: ViettrendTour is a leading destination management service in Vietnam, specializing in crafting tailor-made, sustainable travel experiences. Unlike traditional travel agencies, we focus on creating personalized journeys that immerse travelers in the authentic beauty, culture, and history of Vietnam. With a strong commitment to sustainability and responsible tourism, we design unique itineraries that connect travelers with the heart of Vietnam, offering unforgettable experiences that go beyond the typical tourist route.
